title: PreflightManifest
description: Schema for the preflight manifest produced by the preflight submodule. Transient communication — no embedded schema_namespace/schema_version. DESIGN_PREFLIGHT_APPLY.md §6.

ok.description: Whether all gates passed. When false, apply MUST NOT proceed.

gate_pass.description: Whether this backup_dir passed all gate checks.

gate_errors.description: Gate check error messages for this backup_dir.

applicable_entries.description: File paths within this backup_dir scope that are applicable.

errors.description: Fatal error messages. Each string begins with an E_ code.

warnings.description: Non-fatal warning messages. Each string begins with a W_ code.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the manifest was generated.
